overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long PLUG Daily ETF (PLUL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Plug Power Inc. (Nasdaq: PLUG) stock, less fees, and expenses PLUL was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
